zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Saye於1469年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas Saye1歲，母親Johanna Cheney9歲。她於1508年與Robert Hughes Sr在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1538年5月28日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林武德享年69歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾諾斯 凱斯迪文。

nameMeanings.name: Saye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Slovenian Saje: nickname for someone with very dark, sooty hair, derived from the root of sajast ‘sooty’, or directly from saja ‘soot’.
West African (Liberia): from the personal name Saye, found among the Mano (Mah) people, denoting a first-born boy.

variants.name: Say
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Sai in Orne or Say in Indre, France, perhaps so called from a Gaulish personal name Saius + the Latin locative suffix -acum (see also French name 3 below).

English: nickname, perhaps for someone who made or sold say, a type of woollen cloth, or for an habitual wearer of clothes made of this material, from Middle English sai(e) ‘say’ (Old French saie, from Latin saga, plural of sagum ‘military cloak’). See also Sayer .

French (southern): topographic name from saix (from Latin saxum) ‘rock’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example, Say in Loire, Saix in Tarn and Vienne, Le Saix in Hautes-Alpes, or Les Saix in Isère.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Saye was born in 1469, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Saye, was 1 and her mother, Johanna Cheney, was 9. She married Robert Hughes Sr in 1508, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died on 28 May 1538, in Linwood, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in North Kesteven, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Saye est née en 1469, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Saye, avait 1 ans et sa mère, Johanna Cheney, avait 9 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Hughes Sr en 1508, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 mai 1538, à Linwood, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à North Kesteven, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Lei sposato Robert Hughes Sr nel 1508, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Anne Sayeが1469年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Sayeは1歳，母Johanna Cheneyは9歳であった。1508年にイギリスでRobert Hughes Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1538年5月28日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンウッドで69歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアノース ケステベンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Saye(이)가 1469년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Saye(은)는 1세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Cheney(은)는 9세였다. 그녀는 1508년 영국에서 Robert Hughes Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1538년 5월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 리우드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 노르스 케스티븐에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Robert Hughes Sr em 1508, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de maio de 1538, em Linwood, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em North Kesteven, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Saye родилась в 1469 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Saye было 1 год, а матери, которую звали Johanna Cheney, 9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Hughes Sr в 1508 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 28 мая 1538 г. в местности линвуд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности норт кестивен, линколншир, Англия.
